title: Questions from Quarantine: Immunity Passports
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, which addresses public inquiries during the COVID-19 pandemic. It specifically mentions the topic of 'Immunity Passports' as a focal point for discussion, indicating an exploration of their potential role in public health and security during the crisis. The series aims to provide advice on maintaining mental and physical well-being, encouraging audience participation through social media. The context is set within the broader work of the Security and Global Health Project, linking to related expert content on pandemic preparedness, technology, and global governance.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在回答COVID-19大流行期间公众的疑问。文章特别提及“免疫护照”这一主题，暗示将探讨其在公共卫生与安全危机中的潜在作用。该系列节目旨在提供保持身心健康方面的建议，并通过社交媒体鼓励观众参与提问。内容被置于“安全与全球健康项目”的更广泛工作背景下，并链接到有关大流行防范、技术与全球治理的相关专家文章。
